text.title: Weighted Decision Matrix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (shortlist, stakeholders, evidence, question)?

text.example: Question: tenant datastore. Options: Postgres / Mongo / CockroachDB. Weights set by tech-lead (data-fit 30%, familiarity 20%, ecosystem 15%), SRE (ops 20%), finance (TCO 15%). Evidence from POCs + benchmarks. Totals: Postgres 4.55, Mongo 3.50, Cockroach 2.95. Conflict named: TCO vs ops maturity → rule favours ops on production data. Postgres wins beyond 5% margin; no tie-break needed. Matrix attached to ADR-DATA-014.
